subscription.subject: %event_title% - subscription successful
subscription.body_txt:
Hello %attendant_name%,

You have been successfully subscribed to this event.

Event Details:

Title: %event_title%

Event url: %public_url%

Venue: %location%

Contact person: %talk_to%

Price: %price% %currency%

Date: %start_date% - %end_date%

Thank you for your support.

If you want to unsubscribe click this link %unsubscribe_link%

Best regards,

%company_name%
subscription.body_html:
Hello %attendant_name%,

You have been successfully registered for this event.

%event_title%

📅 %start_date% – %end_date%

📍 %location%

👤 %talk_to%

If you want to unsubscribe, click here.

unsubscription.subject: %event_title% - unsubscription confirmed
unsubscription.body_txt:
Hello,

Your unsubscription from the event "%event_title%" has been confirmed.

If you want to subscribe again, visit: %public_url%

Best regards,
%company_name%
unsubscription.body_html:
Unsubscription confirmed

Your unsubscription from %event_title% has been successfully processed.

Changed your mind? You can sign up again at any time:

Back to event

Best regards,
%company_name%

new_attendant.subject: New registration: %event_title%
new_attendant.body_txt:
A new registration has been received for event "%event_title%".

Attendant: %attendant_name%
Email: %attendant_email%

View attendants in your management panel.
new_attendant.body_html:

👤 %attendant_name%

Log in to your dashboard to manage attendants.

payment_confirmed.subject: Payment confirmed - %event_title%
payment_confirmed.body_txt:
Hello %creator_name%,

The payment for publishing the event "%event_title%" has been confirmed successfully.

The event is now active and visible to the public.

Best regards,
FisEvents
payment_confirmed.body_html:
Payment confirmed!

Hello %creator_name%,

The payment for publishing %event_title% has been received successfully.

✅ Your event is now active and visible to the public.

Thank you for using FisEvents.
The FisEvents team
